entities.name: Vrijen Attawar
entities.context: Founder of Careerspan, career coach turned tech entrepreneur

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company that generates semantic resumes and structured career reflection tools

entities.name: Semantic Resume
entities.context: A deeper, structured resume format generated by Careerspan, distinct from traditional resumes

entities.name: AI Resume Slop
entities.context: V's term for AI-generated resume content that degrades hiring signal quality

entities.name: Princeton + Dartmouth Study
entities.context: PhD-led study analyzing ~2.7M jobs showing AI-generated resumes degraded hiring signal

entities.name: Degraded Hiring Signal
entities.context: Phenomenon where AI-generated resumes cause mis-hiring: missing strong candidates and hiring wrong ones

entities.name: Marginal Cost Near-Zero
entities.context: Observation that AI has reduced the effort cost of resume/cover letter creation, eliminating effort-as-signal

entities.name: Structured Reflection and Job-Aligned Evidence
entities.context: Careerspan's strategic shift away from resume polish toward deeper candidate evidence

entities.name: Talent-First Model
entities.context: Monetization approach: charge employers, give candidates free access

entities.name: Employer-Pays Monetization
entities.context: Revenue model oriented toward charging employers rather than candidates

entities.name: Outcomes Study on Coaching + Careerspan
entities.context: Collaboration concept exploring measurable outcomes from combining coaching with Careerspan tooling

relationships.context: V is the founder and operator of Careerspan
Careerspan generates semantic resumes as a core product capability
V believes traditional resumes are becoming less useful due to AI-generated slop
V cites this study as evidence supporting Careerspan's strategic direction
Study of ~2.7M jobs demonstrated that AI resumes degraded hiring signal in both directions
AI-generated resume content is the mechanism causing degraded hiring signal
Near-zero cost of AI resume generation removes effort-as-signal, contributing to degraded hiring
Careerspan's strategic shift motivated by broken resume signal
Careerspan aligns with talent-first approach to monetization
Talent-first model operationalized by charging employers and giving candidates free access
V envisions a collaboration concept studying measurable outcomes from coaching combined with Careerspan
